---
title: "References and Project Sources"
---

This page collects the main reports, datasets and project outputs linked across my portfolio. It is intended as a practical reference page for readers who want to trace the work behind the selected projects.

## Project Reports

- [The Geography of Everyday Gambling Exposure in London](coursework/qm-gambling/gambling-exposure-london.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Spatio-Temporal Analysis and Prediction of Urban Crime in Chicago](coursework/stdm-chicago-crime/chicago-crime-stdm-report.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Spatial Variation in Road Casualty Risk Across London MSOAs](coursework/dsss-road-casualty/road-casualty-risk-london.ipynb){target="_blank"}

## Project Pages

- [Gambling Exposure in London](qm-gambling.qmd)
- [Chicago Crime STDM Project](stdm-chicago-crime.qmd)
- [London Road Casualty Risk](dsss-road-casualty.qmd)
- [Coursework Overview](coursework.qmd)

## Data Sources Used Across Projects

- OpenStreetMap bookmaker and gambling venue data.
- 2021 UK Census neighbourhood indicators.
- 2021 Middle Layer Super Output Area boundaries for Greater London.
- UK Department for Transport road casualty records.
- London MSOA population and deprivation indicators.
- City of Chicago public crime records.

## Methods Referenced Across Projects

- Spatial joins and neighbourhood-level exposure metrics.
- Regression modelling and model diagnostics.
- Spatial autocorrelation and Local Indicators of Spatial Association.
- Time-series decomposition, ARIMA and SARIMA.
- Random Forest forecasting with engineered temporal features.
- Tree-based regression, permutation importance and partial dependence plots.
